title: St. Nicholas' Church
tagline: St. Nicholas' Church — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: St. Nicholas' Church is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Nicholas' Church, Puthiyathura is a catholic church in the parish of Puthiyathura in the Latin Archdiocese of Trivandrum.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vilavancode taluk
topPlaces.description: Vilavancode taluk is a taluk located in Kanyakumari district, Tamil Nadu, India. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Vilavancode.

topPlaces.name: Kanjiramkulam
topPlaces.description: Kanjiramkulam is a village in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala State, India and is located on Thiruvananthapuram – Kanyakumari NH 66 bypass. It is located 4.5 km from Neyyattinkara town and 22 km from the Kerala State capital Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Pulluvila
topPlaces.description: Pulluvila is a village between Kovalam and Poovar in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala state, India. It is hardly 7 km (4.3 mi) away from the Vizhinjam Port.

topPlaces.name: Karumkulam
topPlaces.description: Karumkulam is a village in Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Arumanoor
topPlaces.description: Arumanoor is a village on the banks of the river Meenachil in Kottayam district, Kerala, India. It is between the towns of Ettumanoor and Ayarkunnam, and has a population of 2,000.

topPlaces.name: Thirupuram
topPlaces.description: Thirupuram is a village in Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India. Thirupuram village is 6 km away from Neyyattinkara, 25 km away from the capital city Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Poovar
topPlaces.description: Poovar is a tourist town in Neyyattinkara (tehsil) in the Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala state, South India. This village is almost at the southern tip of Thiruvananthapuram while the next village, Pozhiyoor, marks the end of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kulathoor, Thiruvananthapuram
topPlaces.description: Kulathoor, is a village in Neyyattinkara Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Nicholas' Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Nicholas' Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Nicholas' Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (21 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (20 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Nicholas' Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Nicholas' Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Nicholas' Church?
faq.a: Stays in St. Nicholas' Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Nicholas' Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vilavancode taluk, Kanjiramkulam, Pulluvila, Karumkulam, Arumanoor.
